Defines macros for concatenating two tokens in C.

# Purpose
This C header file defines two macros for concatenating tokens. The `CONCAT_IMPL` macro uses the token-pasting operator `##` to concatenate two tokens `x` and `y`. The `MACRO_CONCAT` macro serves as a wrapper around `CONCAT_IMPL`, allowing for the concatenation of tokens that may themselves be macros. This file is useful for creating unique identifiers or combining tokens in a preprocessor context.
